g.text: 2.1.1.1.1.1: If System User exists - Corresponding menu: OperatorMainMenu CustomerManagerMainMenu
2.1.1.1: Check if user exists as System User and is Role
2.1.1: Check if user exists as System User and is Role
2.1.3: After 3 attempts display message: "Sorry, we are unable to authenticate you. Please contact your system administrator".
2.1.2: If user does not exist or bad data, display message: "Wrong username or password. You have 3 attempts left".
2.1: Check if user exists as System User and is Role
1.1: Ask user for username and password
Visual Paradigm Standard(joelbruno(Instituto Superior de Engenharia do Porto))
